_meta.model: 2-compartment IV, IIV on V1/CL/V2/Q (diagonal OMEGA), proportional error
notes: OFV reported without N*log(2pi) constant (NONMEM convention).
OpenPKPD gets stuck at a local minimum (OFV~1497) due to V2/Q label-swap near initial values.
NONMEM succeeds because its L-BFGS implementation escapes the local basin more effectively.
Remedy: multi-start optimization or better initialization (V1~10, CL~4, V2~30, Q~9).
_meta.dataset_citation: Bauer RJ (2019). NONMEM tutorial part II: estimation methods and diagnostics for nonlinear mixed-effects models with examples from pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic studies. CPT Pharmacometrics Syst Pharmacol 8(8):538-556. [Dataset 402.csv: 30 subjects, IV bolus, 2-compartment PK.]

openpkpd_comparison.diagnosis: V2 and Q collapsed to a local minimum. NONMEM FOCEI succeeded with same initial values, indicating optimizer quality difference.
